creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Update of port www/mod_dav_svn fails and corrupts system:

chmod 755 /usr/ports/www/mod_dav_svn/work/stage/usr/local/libexec/apache24/mod_authz_svn.so
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for mod_dav_svn-1.8.10
===>   Registering installation for mod_dav_svn-1.8.10
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/www/mod_dav_svn/work/stage/usr/local/libexec/apache24/mod_dontdothat.so): No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/www/mod_dav_svn
*** Error code 1
